title: MagentaFood
description: This mod turns rotten flesh into steaks
body:
# MagentaFood

Tired of wasting chests full of Rotten Flesh? Stop throwing your zombie loot away! MagentaFood is a professional-grade purification mod that turns biological waste into high-quality survival resources.

## MagentaFood Mod Rebranding

After thoughts of the mod creator and dev (me) and my friend, this Mod will be rebranded to MagentaRecipes & QoL

## 🥩 The Purification Process

This mod adds a balanced, high-fidelity smelting recipe to the game:

*   Input: 1x Rotten Flesh
    
*   Process: Thermal Purification (Furnace Smoker and Campfire)
    
*   Time: 1200 Ticks (60 Seconds) (Furnace) / 600 Ticks (Smoker) / 900 Ticks (Campfire) — Quality takes time!
    
*   Output: 1x Cooked Steak
    
*   Bonus: 5.0 XP per item (The ultimate early-game XP farm!)
    

## ℹ️ Technical Information

Singleplayer? Yes

Multiplayer Essential World? Yes, the host **must have the mod installed**, the other players can install them for JEI/EMI/RMI and so on

Multiplayer Server? Yes, server **must** clients **can**

Multipla–? Yes, can't you read?
